movable_parts.name: sm_selfretainingretractor_a01_dx_01
movable_parts.motion: The right arm pivots around the central screw, causing the prongs to spread apart from the left arm.
movable_parts.range_description: Pivots approximately 0-25 degrees from its closed position.

movable_parts.name: sm_selfretainingretractor_a01_sx_01
movable_parts.motion: The left arm pivots around the central screw, causing the prongs to spread apart from the right arm.
movable_parts.range_description: Pivots approximately 0-25 degrees from its closed position.

movable_parts.name: sm_selfretainingretractor_a01_trigger_01
movable_parts.motion: A small release lever that pivots on the right arm to disengage the ratchet mechanism, allowing the retractor to close.

special_notes: This is a ratchet-locking instrument. As the arms are opened, a ratchet mechanism locks them in place at discrete intervals. The 'trigger' part must be actuated to release the lock and allow the arms to close.
grip_location: The finger rings on the handles.
